tweets.text:
🚨 Google CEO, Sundar Pichai says in this video:

"If you don't teach your agents to debug themselves now, you'll keep wasting hours every week"

People charge $500 to teach you this. He just said it for free.

The engineers pulling ahead don't fix failures by hand anymore https://t.co/LDuLfwMkEO https://t.co/Urlg2pQwrY
tweets.name: spect

tweets.text:
🚨 Microsoft CEO, Satya Nadella:

“I don’t want models that only follow instructions. I want models that are truly steerable”

In one hour, he explains why the real AI skill is no longer prompting.

It is directing agents toward an outcome.

> Set the goal
> Define the evaluation https://t.co/UYkfkv6OyO https://t.co/TzqlJrDtbl
tweets.name: spect

tweets.text:
🚨 Google CEO Sundar Pichai:

"If you don't learn how to orchestrate agents now, you'll spend 2027 catching up to people who started today"

30 minutes. One interview. Why the best engineers at Google quietly stopped shipping code in 2025 and what they orchestrate instead.

Don't https://t.co/psnAkyCi0A https://t.co/NdHz10XDge

tweets.text:
🚨 Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella just said the thing most people are still not ready to hear:

"Agents can write code now. The human job is to understand what they built"

Read that again.

The skill gap is no longer just coding.

It is knowing how to direct AI, review its work, https://t.co/M7kTwgO6q4 https://t.co/ktgnpflqQA

tweets.text:

Wealth in AI isn't built by scrolling through hype

It's built by mastering the actual tools

Agents, Interactions API, prompts, memory, skills, MCP, and automation workflows

tweets.text:
🚨 Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei just said the thing most people aren't ready to hear:

"AI revenue could hit a trillion dollars before 2030"

Read that again. A trillion. Before 2030.

And here is the part everyone misses

We are not late. We are early. Painfully early.

tweets.text:
Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said the thing every programmer is afraid to hear:

"In a year or two, AI won't just help write code it'll do the entire job of a software engineer"

Not autocomplete. Not a faster assistant

The whole thing: figure out the problem, write it, test it, https://t.co/m817IHjlv7 https://t.co/NdHz10XDge
tweets.name: spect

tweets.text:
🚨 Jack Clark: Co-founder of Claude and former OpenAI policy director:

"80% of the code that goes into Anthropic now comes from Claude"

Let that sink in. The company building one of the world's most powerful AI models now writes most of its own code with that AI.

Most people https://t.co/83k02UT2AT https://t.co/ktgnpflqQA
tweets.name: spect

tweets.text:
Boris Cherny, the engineer who built Claude Code, just said the quiet part out loud:

"Claude has been writing 100% of my code. For at least six months"

Read that again. The guy who built the tool doesn't write code anymore.

And most engineers are still polishing the exact https://t.co/T5ooQjWhRY https://t.co/Urlg2pQwrY
